summary: Operators of the Rubicon Center reported 105 targets destroyed on April 16, 2026, including Ukrainian personnel, fixed-wing UAVs, and logistics routes across the Donbas, Sumy, and Belgorod directions, with operations continuing the next day in the Donbas, Krasny Liman, and Belgorod areas, targeting personnel, fixed-wing UAVs, long-range UAVs, and UAV launch points. Ukrainian forces in the Kostiantynivka direction, including the 36th Marine Brigade, survived a Russian FPV drone attack, with footage showing a soldier using a drone detector at 0:11 to identify the threat. Ukrainian operators employed electronic warfare interference tactics, such as issuing a 15-second ultimatum to land an FPV drone, while Russian soldiers were recorded being hit by FPV drones during assaults on motorcycles or after feigning surrender and attempting to flee.
